calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-17-2018 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance. Notice having been given and there being no appearance or objection filed, the Court ordered the case dismisssed pursuant to California Rules of Court 3.1385. Judge: A. James Robertson II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Proceedings not reported.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-05-2017 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Jul-17-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: Vivian Leung Lerche, Esq., specially appearing for Plaintiff. Case settled. Court ordered case scheduled for a dismissal Order to Show Cause per CRC 3.1385 on July 17, 2018 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jun-07-2017 Continued To Oct-03-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $400.00 for failure to appear. The OSC is re-set to October 3, 2017 at 10:30 am, in Department 610. Judge: Teri L. Jackson; Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos; Proceedings not reported. (610)
